title: Nancy Steele Is Missing!
writer: Charles Francis Coe, Gene Fowler, Hal Long
actors: Victor McLaglen, Walter Connolly, Peter Lorre
plot: After being in jail for seventeen years a crook is met by the girl he kidnapped as a baby. She now thinks he's her father. When he returns her to her real father there's a job and a reward, but an old prisonmate gets in the way.
